prerequisites.description: Required prerequisites (completed before major coursework; not counted toward major credits)
notes: Two courses from: Anthropology, Art, Communication, History, Literature, Music, Philosophy, Political Science, Religion, or Theater

electives.description: Select elective Social Work courses to complement the core curriculum

constraints: SW220 (Introduction to Social Work and Social Justice) is the required gateway course; must be completed before all 300- and 400-level SW courses.
SW311 and SW402 and SW406 must be completed before beginning SW471 (Practicum I) and SW472 (Generalist Practice I).
SW471 and SW472 must be completed before SW473 (Practicum II) and SW474 (Generalist Practice II).
SW475 (Integration Seminar) requires completion of SW473 and SW474.
Minimum cumulative GPA of 3.0 required to declare and maintain enrollment in the major.
No grade lower than C accepted in any social work core course.
Field/practicum placement (SW471, SW473) requires concurrent enrollment in the corresponding practice seminar.
Total major credits: approximately 45-48. Total degree credits: ~120.
notes: BA offered jointly with the School of Arts and Sciences (SAS) New Brunswick and Camden campuses; students must be admitted to the partnering liberal arts college.
Full CSWE accreditation; graduates are eligible for LSW licensure in New Jersey.

social_work_msw_clinical.major_name: Social Work (MSW) — Clinical Social Work Specialization

foundation_courses.description: Foundation year — required for all students except those admitted under Advanced Standing (21 credits of coursework + 6 credits of practicum/seminar = 27 credits total)

specialization_required.description: Clinical Social Work advanced year required courses (6 credits)

advanced_practice_distribution.description: Choose one Advanced Practice Distribution course in a specialized population (3 credits)

advanced_contemporary_policy.description: Choose one Advanced Contemporary Policy course (3 credits)

research_requirement.description: Required research and evaluation course (3 credits)

electives.description: Four elective courses chosen from MSW elective offerings (12 credits)

constraints: Total credits: 60 (27 foundation + 33 advanced). Advanced Standing students complete 39 credits (advanced year only).
MSW511 (Clinical Social Work I) requires completion of MSW500 and MSW507.
MSW512 (Clinical Social Work II) requires completion of MSW511.
MSW595 requires completion of MSW505.
MSW600 and MSW601 require completion of foundation practicum (MSW508, MSW509).
Minimum GPA of 3.0 required to remain in good standing.
All practicum hours are arranged through the Office of Practicum Learning.
Available in Traditional On-Campus, Blended Online, 100% Online, and Intensive Weekend formats.
notes: Clinical specialization prepares students for direct practice with individuals, families, groups, and communities.
Graduates eligible for LMSW licensure in New Jersey upon completion.

social_work_msw_management_policy.major_name: Social Work (MSW) — Management and Policy Specialization

foundation_courses.description: Foundation year — required for all students except those admitted under Advanced Standing (21 credits of coursework + 6 credits of practicum/seminar = 27 credits total)

specialization_required.description: Management and Policy advanced year required courses (6 credits)

advanced_practice_distribution.description: Choose one Management and Policy Advanced Practice Distribution course (3 credits)

advanced_contemporary_policy.description: Choose one Advanced Contemporary Policy course (3 credits)

research_requirement.description: Required research and evaluation course (3 credits)

electives.description: Four elective courses chosen from MSW elective offerings (12 credits)

constraints: Total credits: 60 (27 foundation + 33 advanced). Advanced Standing students complete 39 credits (advanced year only).
MSW535 (Management Practice and Theory) requires completion of MSW500 and MSW501.
MSW536 (Program and Strategic Planning) requires completion of MSW535.
MSW595 requires completion of MSW505.
MSW600 and MSW601 require completion of foundation practicum (MSW508, MSW509).
Minimum GPA of 3.0 required to remain in good standing.
All practicum hours are arranged through the Office of Practicum Learning.
Available in Traditional On-Campus, Blended Online, 100% Online, and Intensive Weekend formats.
notes: Management and Policy specialization prepares students for leadership roles in social service agencies, nonprofits, and public policy settings.
Graduates eligible for LMSW licensure in New Jersey upon completion.
